input.name: Ravi Kumar
input.message: Need funnels for product launch next month. What are your pricing plans?

expected_output.reasoning: Lead has a concrete deadline (next month), specific use case (product launch), and explicitly asked for pricing — all strong purchase-intent signals.
signals: specific use case: product launch funnel
expected_output.response: Hey Ravi! A product launch funnel with a one-month runway is exactly where KeaBuilder shines. I'd love to walk you through our pricing and show you a template that fits SaaS launches — we can typically have you live in 48 hours. Are you free for a 15-minute call this week?

input.name: Priya
input.message: I run a coaching business and I'm exploring tools to capture leads from my website. Not sure what I need yet.

expected_output.reasoning: Priya has a clear business context and genuine interest in lead capture, but no urgency and explicitly stated she's still exploring — classic warm nurturing opportunity.
signals: identified pain point: website lead capture
expected_output.response: Hi Priya! Coaching businesses are one of our biggest use cases — a well-placed lead capture form with a freebie offer can turn casual blog readers into booked discovery calls. Since you're still exploring, it might help to see how a few other coaches use KeaBuilder. Want me to send over 2-3 examples that match your style?

expected_output.reasoning: Single-word message with no name, email, or business context — no signals of intent or urgency whatsoever.
expected_output.response: Hey there! Thanks for dropping by KeaBuilder. We help businesses capture and qualify leads automatically using smart funnels. Curious — what kind of project are you working on? Even a rough idea helps me point you in the right direction.
expected_output.follow_up_question: What kind of business or project are you working on right now?
